description: Repository-privacy gate per the dynamic-GPTQ-loader/repository-visibility addendum. An independent GitHub metadata read reports the repository as public. Flagged for operator resolution; the aggregate-only write boundary continues to be enforced.

assessment.commit_safety_enforced: every commit passes check_commit_safe.py (no private paths / prompt / output / notes text); no task text, prompts, tokens, outputs, hidden states, routes, Jacobians, weights, caches, credentials, or per-task predictions have been committed
assessment.action_taken: NOT auto-changing repository visibility (outward-facing operator action; the operator uses GitHub as the progress view). Flagged for operator to confirm whether public visibility is intentional or should be restored to private.
assessment.gate: no later scientific phase may begin while repository visibility and artifact-destination controls disagree; continue aggregate-only until the operator resolves visibility
